title: onobrychis wettsteinii
intro: Onobrychis wettsteinii, also known as Wettstein's bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Onobrychis wettsteinii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
